column1: D+85 = 85 working days ≈ 4.25 tháng calendar. Team 8 người → cần ~D+175 (8.8 tháng). Giữ D+85 → cần ~14 người (BE×4 + FE×4).

column5: Lý do dependency
Không dependency. Foundation đầu tiên phải build: Country Config, Middleware, URL Routing, Dual Tenancy.
Cần country_code middleware + Country Config để tạo country_profiles. Shared User Model, Profile CRUD, Context Switching.
Cần Country Config (languages per country). Backend locale files, Frontend translation framework, Multilingual CMS.
Cần Country Config (currency per country) + User Identity (display currency pref). Exchange Rate, Tax Engine, Display Service.
Feature Flags + Secrets cần Country Config. Có thể song song với User Identity + i18n.
Monitoring per Country + Reconciliation Rate. Cần core stable trước.
Admin Auth + RBAC + Team Mgmt + Data Isolation. Cần Multi-Tenancy middleware cho country-scoped access.
Country Config CRUD, Feature Flags UI, Admin User Mgmt, Audit Log, Tax Rules. Cần RBAC + Country Config Service.
OAuth Login, Country Selection, Country Switcher, Language Switcher, Referral. Cần Shared User Identity + i18n framework.
Landing Page, Public Campaign Preview, Profile Management, Social Linking. Cần i18n + URL country routing.
Create Campaign, Approval Workflow, Reward Structure, Budget Mgmt, Analytics. Cần RBAC + i18n + Currency display.
Campaign List, Detail, Join, My Campaigns, Content Requirements. Cần Creator có account + Admin đã tạo campaigns.
KYC Checklist, Gov ID, Bank, Tax ID, Contract, Status. Cần Country Config (KYC requirements) + Creator account.
Submit Content, Status Tracking, My Content. Cần Creator join campaign + Admin có content moderation pipeline.
Moderation Queue, Preview, Approve/Reject, Bulk Actions. Cần Creator đã submit content để moderate.
KYC Queue, Document Review, Approve/Reject. Cần Creator đã submit KYC documents.
Creator List, Detail, Ban/Suspend, Notifications. Cần Creator data + Admin RBAC.
T&C, Notification Templates, Partner Config, Export Reports. Cần i18n + Admin permissions.
Earnings Dashboard, Per Campaign/Content, Net Income, Tax Breakdown. Cần Currency Display + Tax Engine + content approved.

Cross-Country Dashboard, Revenue, Acting-as-Local, Comparison, Reports. Cần tất cả Admin core features.
Facebook Login, Deferred KYC, Leaderboard, E-Wallet, Receipt, Referral, Chart, Email, Notification Prefs, Account Deletion.
Activity Dashboard, Auto-Reject, Violation, Notifications, Clone, Partner Analytics, Mod Stats, Templates, Bulk Import, etc.
Brand Login, RBAC (3 roles), Onboarding Wizard, Market Selection, Profile. Cần Admin RBAC system + Campaign model ready.
Campaign Builder, Reward, Budget, Approval (→ Admin review), Scheduling, Requirements, Hashtag. Cần Admin Campaign workflow.

column5: Creators List, Content Feed, Preview, Status Tracking. Cần Creator submit + Admin moderate content.
Dashboard, Campaign Analytics, Budget Overview, Cost Summary. Cần Campaign data + financial data.
KYB, Campaign Clone, Brand Content Review, Creator Ranking, Content Analytics, ROI, Cross-Country, Export, Invoice, Custom Domain, Notification Prefs.
API & Webhook Configuration. Cần Brand Portal hoàn chỉnh trước khi mở API cho external integration.

column2: 1. Team: BE×2 + FE×2 + QC×1 + PM×1 + SA×0.5 + BA×0.5 + DevOps×0.5 + Design×0.5 = 8 người (1,280h/tháng).
2. D+85 = 85 working days ≈ 4.25 tháng calendar. D+x thể hiện THỨ TỰ dependency — không phải calendar schedule.
3. Với team 8 người (BE×2): timeline thực tế ≈ D+175 (8.8 tháng). Giữ D+85 cần ~14 người (BE×4 + FE×4).
4. Critical path: Multi-Tenancy → User Identity → Creator/Admin Core → Content Pipeline → Finance → Brand Portal.
5. Platform Core (D+10~D+25) là bottleneck lớn nhất — mọi module đều depend vào foundation này.
6. Creator + Admin overlap từ D+20 (Admin Auth/RBAC) nhưng feature pipeline thực sự bắt đầu D+30 khi foundation đủ.
7. Brand Portal bắt đầu D+50 — KHÔNG THỂ sớm hơn vì cần Admin Campaign + Content Moderation pipeline stable.
8. Phase 2 (Enhancement) có thể delay nếu Phase 1 gặp issues — buffer ~5 ngày giữa D+45 Core complete và D+50 Brand start.
9. Cumulative hours (9,442h) > Grand Total (8,108h) vì có overlap giữa các module trong cùng giai đoạn.
10. Tech Stack: Go/Echo + React/UmiJS + MongoDB + Redis + MinIO (Enhanced Monolith).
